name: Roadmap.sh
description: Roadmap.sh — community-driven platform providing visual developer learning roadmaps for frontend, backend, DevOps, and 20+ other tech paths.

seo.title: Roadmap.sh — Developer Documentation / DevRel
seo.meta_description: Roadmap.sh: Roadmap.sh — community-driven platform providing visual developer learning roadmaps for frontend, backend, DevOps, and 20+ other tech paths.

when_to_use: Frontend learning roadmap followed to structure self-study plan
DevOps skill gap identified using community-contributed roadmap
Onboarding path shared with junior engineers joining the team
Backend roadmap used to plan 6-month individual growth goal
React roadmap embedded in team wiki as learning curriculum

pros: Free visual roadmaps span dozens of tech paths
Great orientation tool for career switchers
cons: Roadmaps suggest volume, not depth or quality
Can overwhelm beginners with too many topics
Not a teaching platform - no actual lessons
review.verdict: Great map of the terrain but not the terrain itself; use it for orientation, not learning.
review.best_for: Self-taught devs and career switchers needing a high-level map of technologies to explore.
review.not_for: Structured hands-on learners who need actual courses and exercises, not just topic lists.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
